_comment: PRE-SPLIT baseline captured by ours/tools/vio_run.py (the reference oracle) BEFORE the 5-project split. Each entry holds the rounded display ATE block (mm) AND the full-precision f64 values in metres that the byte-parity gate compares. The new in-process oracle (verification/oracle_replay.py) drives the NEW projects' verbatim-ported math through the SAME vio_run scoring loop and MUST reproduce these numbers (verification/oracle_replay_selftest.py asserts == within 1e-6 mm; the harness also re-derives the OLD oracle live for a full-precision head-to-head). Captured: .venv/bin/python ours/tools/vio_run.py --session <session> --backend <backend> --max-frames <max_frames>.
_full_precision_field: _m holds the raw float64 in METRES (rmse_m, median_m, max_m); rmse_mm/median_mm/max_mm are the rounded display values vio_run prints.
